title: Moderation Update - Action Taken on Community Reports
body:
We've reviewed and acted on today's community reports:

✅ Actions Taken:
• Banned user 'spam_wave_42' for posting phishing links across 6 channels
• Banned user 'toxic_runner' for targeted harassment of newcomers  
• Warned user 'bot_like_user_77' for suspicious automated behavior

ℹ️ Resolved:
• False positive report against 'core_maintainer' identified and dismissed (coordinated brigading)

Community safety remains our priority. Reports are reviewed promptly—thank you to everyone who flagged concerns.
